startDurableSlice.description: Establish a durable worktree-backed lane for substantial Discord coding work before deep implementation continues.

resumeDurableSlice.description: Resume an existing durable Discord coding lane from a verified worktree/branch instead of restarting the slice.

inboundDeadlineGuard.description: Classify Discord inbound work before long phases; fail closed into ack-then-delegate/checkpoint-and-release when the reply-worker budget is unsafe.
